name: gov-mcp
description: Runtime governance for AI agents — enforce file access, command execution, and delegation policies via MCP

tools.name: gov_check
tools.description: Check if an action is allowed by governance contract before execution

tools.name: gov_delegate
tools.description: Delegate a task to a sub-agent with governance context

tools.name: gov_query_cieu
tools.description: Query CIEU audit log (Contextual, Intervention, Execution, Update records)

tools.name: gov_install
tools.description: Install governance contracts for a project directory

tools.name: gov_doctor
tools.description: Check governance system health and configuration

tools.name: gov_omission_scan
tools.description: Scan for missing governance checks in recent actions

tools.name: gov_path_verify
tools.description: Verify file path access is within allowed scopes

tools.name: gov_escalate
tools.description: Request human approval for actions outside normal governance boundaries
